content:
Hello everyone. I got a problem. My linting does not work. I used the Makefile and Kbuild files as appointed in the out-of-tree example. And I also used the generate_rust_analyzer.py script to make myself a rust-project.json file. Apparently, rust-analyzer loads the kernel module as well as the others, but I cannot get proper linting in the files. I already referenced it in .vscode/settings.json. I want to get highlighting to work.

And, also, I want to have interoperability between Cargo and make. Is that possible?

Here's my issue if you want some visualisation.
image.png
